testcase.name: test_08_gm_can_see_planning_changes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gm_re_edit_changelog.py:221: in test_08_gm_can_see_planning_changes self.login_as_role("planning") backend/tests/test_gm_re_edit_changelog.py:40: in login_as_role assert response.status_code == 200, f"Demo login failed for {role}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Demo login failed for planning: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_gm_can_update_scope_items
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_gm_re_edit_changelog.py:252: in test_09_gm_can_update_scope_items self.login_as_role("general_manager") backend/tests/test_gm_re_edit_changelog.py:40: in login_as_role assert response.status_code == 200, f"Demo login failed for {role}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Demo login failed for general_manager: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
